$schema_note: Ground truth for offline eval lane `eval_tool_selection` (ADR-0005 §5 Horizon 1). Each entry pairs a user-framed task with the tool (and expected arguments) the agent SHOULD pick at that step. Populate only from real captured sessions to avoid synthetic self-grading. Minimum shipable sample count: 30.

collection_protocol.source: opt-in anonymized session traces under .codelens/eval-traces/ (Horizon 1 item #2)
collection_protocol.redaction: PII-scrubbed; file paths kept only if inside the project scope; user query text rewritten into canonical task form
collection_protocol.labelling: at least two reviewers agree on the correct_tool before a sample is committed to this file
collection_protocol.rejection_policy: samples where reviewers disagree go to tool-selection-dataset-pending.json, not here
